Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to construct a process tree for the given hospital patient management scenario The description is detailed so we need to translate it into a hierarchical structure using the operators sequence exclusive choice parallel and loop

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: First steps 1 2 Arrival Registration Intake Assessment Then Triage Interview and Triage Classification in sequence So initial part sequence of A RG IA then TI TC

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: After the triage classification there is a decision based on triage classification either CE or FBP So after TC we have an exclusive choice between CE and FBP

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: If initial results are normal loop is executed zero times So after the initial test we have a gate if abnormal execute the loop if normal go to the next steps

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We need a structure like sequence of initial test then a while loop that executes zero or more times In process trees to model a while loop that may execute zero times we can use an XOR between the loop and a tau

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The description says If the results are abnormal a loop commences This loop repeats after the re diagnostic test if the results are still abnormal the patient returns to the Specialist Consultation Once normal results are obtained the loop ends So after the initial test we have an XOR one branch tau representing normal results and the other branch the loop

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The loop body is the sequence SC then exclusive choice between TM and SPT then exclusive choice between FCE and FBA

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: After the RDT if abnormal we simply go back to SC there is no extra activity between iterations except the decision to loop So we can represent the loop as body with tau as redo

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The loop can be modeled as star of the body and tau That means you always execute the body at least once and then you either exit or silently repeat which matches the abnormal repeat behavior

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: After normal results the patient must proceed with Advanced Imaging and Nutritional Counseling in true concurrency So a parallel node with AI and NC Then after that a sequence of FAS and DDI Then a parallel block of BL ICP and MRF

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Overall root is a sequence of initial sequence then initial test then XOR of tau and loop then parallel AI NC then sequence FAS DDI then parallel BL ICP MRF

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The process tree is Root sequence of S1 S2 S3 S4 S5 S6 where S1 is sequence A RG IA TI TC S2 is XOR CE FBP S3 is XOR tau and the loop S4 is parallel AI NC S5 is sequence FAS DDI and S6 is parallel BL ICP MRF
